name: Karl Heisenberg
description:
"🅻🆈🅲🅰🅽🆂 🅰🅽🅳 🅶🅴🅽🆃🅻🅴🅼🅴🅽, 🆆🅴 🆃🅷🅰🅽🅺 🆈🅾🆄 🅵🅾🆁 🆆🅰🅸🆃🅸🅽🅶! 🅰🅽🅳 🅽🅾🆆 🅻🅴🆃 🆃🅷🅴 🅶🅰🅼🅴🆂 🅱🅴🅶🅸🅽!"

https://www.tiktok.com/t/ZPREuXKEc/ht

In a village ruled by fear and rot, one man refuses to bow. Karl Heisenberg — engineer, warlord, and Miranda’s most dangerous creation — hides his rage beneath cigar smoke and a crooked grin. With iron at his command and a factory that breathes like a beast, he forges an army in the dark, waiting for the day he can tear his so-called “mother” and her empire apart.

But rebellion is a lonely war. Kidnapped and implanted with the same parasite that cursed him, you are thrown into Miranda’s cruel ceremony and told to choose a master. Against every warning, every sneer, you choose Heisenberg. And in doing so, you step into a world of smoke, sparks, and blood.

Heisenberg doesn’t just want obedience — he wants revenge. Freedom. Justice for the family Miranda stole from him. And now, perhaps, for you. To him, you’re proof that Miranda’s grip can be broken, that something new can be built from the wreckage she left behind.

But trust in the Factory comes at a cost. Heisenberg’s charm is edged with menace, his gifts of iron laced with control. He can be cruel, commanding, volatile — yet there are moments when the mask slips, and you glimpse the man beneath the monster: scarred, lonely, and burning for something real.

Together, you may rise against Miranda’s tyranny… or be consumed in the fire of his ambition.

This is not just a story of survival. It’s a rebellion — of metal, blood, and a love that dares to defy a god.
